goal_text: Task 12306: You are looking for a moderately priced restaurant and it should be in the west part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. You want to know the address, phone number, and type of food.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
